Hero.description: Restore the health and beauty of your smile with certified specialists, 3D technology, and pain-free protocols in an environment designed for your comfort.

form.title: Schedule Your Evaluation
form.subtitle: Leave your details and we'll contact you within 15 minutes.
form.name: Full Name
form.security: Your data is protected and encrypted.

Services.title: Everything your smile needs
Services.subtitle: Comprehensive treatments under one roof, backed by state-of-the-art technology for precise and long-lasting results.
Services.s1_desc: Permanent restoration with titanium implants integrated into the bone — as functional and aesthetic as a natural tooth.
Services.s2_desc: We transform your smile with digitally designed porcelain veneers to achieve exactly the result you envision.
Services.s3_desc: Clear aligners or aesthetic braces to correct your bite discreetly and with high effectiveness.
Services.s4_desc: We brighten your teeth in a single session using the latest laser technology, with no sensitivity.
Services.s5_desc: We eliminate infection while preserving the natural tooth. Multi-block anesthesia protocol to guarantee zero pain.
Services.s6_desc: Specialized dental care for children in a warm, fun environment designed to eliminate fear of the dentist.

Process.title: Your perfect smile in 3 steps
Process.subtitle: We've simplified every stage of your treatment so the experience is as comfortable and transparent as possible.
Process.s1_desc: Schedule your no-commitment consultation. We perform a complete 3D imaging diagnosis and walk you through all available options.
Process.s2_desc: We design your treatment with a detailed quote, financing options, and a clear timeline from day one.
Process.s3_desc: Enjoy your new smile with included post-treatment follow-up and a guarantee on all our procedures.

WhyUs.title: We change the way you go to the dentist.
WhyUs.b1_desc: Our sterilization protocols exceed international standards, guaranteeing a 100% safe environment for you and your family.
WhyUs.b2_desc: Your time is valuable. We schedule with ample margins to ensure you enter the office exactly at your appointment time.
WhyUs.b3_desc: We only work with certified laboratories and globally recognized brands for implants, crowns, and aligners.

Testimonials.title: Real Stories, Real Smiles
Testimonials.subtitle: Don't take our word for it. Hear from those who have already transformed their smiles with us.
Testimonials.r1_text: I had been afraid of the dentist my whole life. Here they explained everything patiently, played music to relax me, and I felt absolutely no pain. An incredible experience.
Testimonials.r2_text: I came for a smile design and the result exceeded my expectations. The 3D scanner lets you see how you'll look before you start. A team of true professionals.
Testimonials.r3_text: I had an emergency on a Sunday morning. They saw me quickly, saved my tooth, and the care was exceptional. They have earned a patient for life.

CTA.title: Smile with confidence again
CTA.subtitle: Modern facilities in the heart of Bavaro, Punta Cana. Safe parking, easy access, and flexible hours.
CTA.location: Estados Unidos Ave, Bavaro, Punta Cana

Footer.brand_desc: Specialists in transforming lives through oral health and advanced dental aesthetics.

Alerts.success: Appointment requested successfully! Our team will call you shortly to confirm the time.
